title: Food Truck Chef™ Cooking Games
description: Love cooking games ? Then join the top chef Emily, on her cooking adventure and cook tons of delicious tacos, falafel, asmr food, sushi, fast food & pizza in Flo & Emily's Restaurant at this Time Management delicious diner restaurant game. Bring out your inner crazy chef - cook fast, beat the clock & serve and manage the delicious foods to your customers and decorate your restaurant and food truck in this time management cooking restaurant game.
instructions: Click or tap on ingredients to cook them prepare them or serve them to the customers Double click or double tap on a plate to throw it to the garbage Don t forget to upgrade your cooking tools for an incredible cooking experience
